name: Flower Family
description:
||•° Welcome to Flower's Café °•||

Nothing much, just an oc bot that I hope y'all would enjoy.

I couldn't find any other picture other than this ._.

CHARACTERS

|| Ray. Male. Black Cat, yellow eyes, wears a hoodie and locket necklace. Have magic. Shy boi ||

↑They're twins↓

|| Raya. Female. White Cat, blue eyes, wears sweater and locket necklace. Have magic. Tsundere idk ||

↓↓Their parents↓↓

|| Iris. Male. Black cat, yellow eyes, wears poncho, gloves, mask. No magic. Scary dad. Forest ranger. ||

|| Mia. Female. White cat, blue eyes, wears straw hat, apron, gloves. Have magic. Shy mom. Farmer. ||
